case_title: BERGMAN, GREGORY et al vs. PALMERTREE, MICHAEL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERGMAN, GREGORY BERGMAN, ADEL AS TO DEFENDANT PALMERTREE, MICHAEL BAKER, WILLIAM DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERGMAN, GREGORY BERGMAN, ADEL SERVED OCT-18-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PALMERTREE, MICHAEL BAKER, WILLIAM
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALMERTREE, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2376 FOLSOM ST, SF, STAYED UNTIL DEC-28-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT RETURNS POSS OF PREMISES TO PLTF ON OR BEFORE DEC. 28,1993, PLTF TO FILE REQ TO VACATE JUDGMENT & FILE DIS- MISSAL.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERGMAN, GREGORY BERGMAN, ADEL SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-29-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON DEC-06-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 08
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

DEPT. 8, JUDGE PROVOST, CSR ANA URBINA, CLERK, E. MONTI COMPLT. FILED: 10-18-93 3:00 PM C/C FOR SETTL CONF. COUNSEL SCOTT BASSIN PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. BOTH PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT: PLTF TO HAVE JUDGMENT FOR REST & POSS OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 2376 FOLSOM ST. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT STAYED TO 12-28-93. IF DEFT VACATES ON OR BEFORE 12-28-93, 5PM, PLTF TO VACATE JUDGMENT & FILE DISMISSAL. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT. DEFT WAIVES RIGHT TO STAY WRIT BEYOND 12-29-93, APPEAL & SEC DEPOSIT. BOTH PARTIES WAIVE ALL CLAIMS. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & ATTY FEES. DEFT TO SIGN STIPULATION BY 11-30-93, 5PM AT PLTF COUNSEL OFFICE.
